rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. IN RE: 52 TEDDY AVENUE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decs Of Kathleen Palka And Richard Barr In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 1. CLAIMANT KATHLEEN PALKA Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decs Of Kathleen Palka And Richard Barr In Support Thereof Hearing Required. Kathleen Palka to be present. Counsel for the claimant to e-mail Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 5:00 p.m. to obtain a Zoom link. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on November 18, 2020 moving party to file a declaration/RJN attaching the following documents: (1) Any filings with the Probate Court listing the amounts held by this Court as an asset of the estate, e.g. Petition, Amended/Corrected/Supplemental Inventory and Appraisal, etc; (2) any official or financial documents for which the decedent "Patrick M. Miller" used the name "Pat M. Miller," e.g. bank statements, utility bills; (3) copies of cancelled checks/electronic wires/automatic payments showing that the decedent Patrick M. Miller paid mortgage subject to the foreclosed Deed of Trust; and (4) copies of tax filings listing 52 Teddy Avenue as residence, mailing address or claiming interest deductions for this property by the decedent. Documents in item 4 maybe submitted without filing for in-camera review only. No further argument is allowed; supplemental briefing shall be limited to the documents listed above. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY MA ET AL VS. PATRICK FOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT NORTH POINT OCEAN PARTNERS, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Hearing Required for counsel to address whether the Defendant's principals, e.g. Chris Holden, were contacted to provide notice and determine a good service address for the defendant =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELA ARMSTRONG VS. MELI BROWN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses (Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT MELI BROWN Notice Of Motion Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses (Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents) is transferred to department 301 to be heard on November 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ABIGAIL PER LEE VS. JEFFREY ANKER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF ABIGAIL LEE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file and serve Amended and Supplemental Complaint forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: EDUARDO ALEGRETT VS. STANISLAV REZNITSKIY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT STANISLAV REZNITSKIY, ELEONORA ERMOLOVA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises issues of fact that cannot be addressed at this stage of the litigation. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRI COUNTIES BANK VS. CATHERINE CHOW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2020 line 6. PLAINTIFF TRI COUNTIES BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment was heard and DENIED on September 9, 2020. No authority cited for the proposition that a second motion for summary judgment may be filed by the same party on the same grounds. =(501/CFH)
